headline: Capital One Software Expands Databolt Capabilities to Address Growing Complexity of Enterprise Data Security

headline: Upwind Unveils Novel Approach to High-Speed, Precise Detection of Malicious AI Prompts with Nvidia AI
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 23, 2026--Upwind, the runtime-first cloud security platform leader today unveiled the results of research from RSAC Conference demonstrating that malicious Large Language Model (LLM) prompts can be detected with approximately 95% precision, while maintaining sub-millisecond inference for real-time traffic with Nvidia technology.
